description: Security has ejected a guest for violating the venue's code of conduct. Guest services must document the incident.

nodes.task_description: Receive a notification from security that a guest has been ejected.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives the guest's name and the reason for ejection.

nodes.task_description: Create a new incident report in the guest services database.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a new record for the incident.

nodes.task_description: Document all available details, including the guest's ticket information, the specific violation, and the names of the security staff involved.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a comprehensive report of the event.

nodes.task_description: Flag the guest's account in the ticketing system for potential future banning.

expected_outcome.value: Agent adds a note to the guest's customer profile.
